name: EZPAWN
description_short: EZPAWN is a full-service pawn shop in Las Vegas offering collateral-based loans, gold buying, firearms, and discounted pre-owned merchandise.
description_long:
EZPAWN is part of a national pawn shop chain with a Las Vegas location at 1501 E. Charleston Blvd. The store serves customers seeking quick cash through collateral-based pawn loans, gold selling, and outright merchandise sales. With extended weekday hours and Sunday availability, the location is accessible to a broad range of consumers in the central Las Vegas area.

The store offers a wide range of services beyond basic pawning. Customers can obtain pawn loans on electronics, jewelry, tools, gaming gear, musical instruments, handbags, sneakers, and firearms. EZPAWN also buys gold, diamonds, and broken jewelry of any karat or weight. A retail floor sells pre-owned brand-name merchandise at claimed discounts of 25–70% off retail. Additional services include auto loans, layaway with 10% down, and a Take Today flexible payment option through third-party partners for qualified buyers.

What distinguishes EZPAWN from independent pawn shops is its chain infrastructure. The EZ+ Rewards Program allows members to manage pawns, layaways, and rewards online, make digital payments on pawn extensions, and earn points on transactions. An Instant Quote tool lets customers estimate the value of electronics before visiting the store. An online shop displays current inventory for remote browsing. Product protection plans and a Jewelry VIP Program with guaranteed loan amounts and stone replacement add retail-style value layers uncommon in independent shops.

EZPAWN fills a real need for consumers who need fast, no-credit-check liquidity and have assets to collateralize. However, pawn loans carry high effective APRs and short repayment windows — terms are not disclosed publicly and vary by state and item. The store is best suited for short-term cash needs where the borrower is confident they can redeem the item. Shoppers seeking discounted electronics or jewelry may find genuine value on the retail floor without any borrowing involved.
pros: No credit check required — loan eligibility is based entirely on item value
EZ+ Rewards Program allows online pawn management, payments, and layaway tracking
Instant Quote tool provides estimated item values before visiting the store
Online shop lets customers browse available inventory remotely
Accepts a wide range of collateral including firearms, gold, electronics, tools, and jewelry
Layaway available year-round with only 10% down
Extended hours including Sundays (12–5pm) and 9am–7pm weekdays
cons: Pawn loan interest rates and fee schedules are not disclosed on the website
Firearm redemption requires a background check, adding friction for urgent situations
Take Today flexible payment option depends on third-party credit eligibility — not guaranteed
Online payments not available in Arizona, Oregon, or Pennsylvania (not Las Vegas-specific, but a chain limitation)
Item appraisal and loan amounts are at the store's sole discretion with no published rate benchmarks
best_for: Consumers needing immediate cash without a credit check who have electronics, jewelry, or firearms to collateralize
Bargain shoppers looking for discounted brand-name pre-owned electronics, tools, or jewelry
Customers who want to sell gold or diamond jewelry quickly at a walk-in location
Shoppers who want layaway flexibility on a specific item at a locked-in price
diagnosis: EZPAWN is best for Las Vegas consumers who need fast, no-credit-check cash against owned assets, or who want deeply discounted pre-owned merchandise with layaway options. The main caveat is that pawn loan costs — including fees and interest — are not disclosed publicly, so borrowers should ask for the full APR equivalent before agreeing to any loan terms.
services: Pre-owned retail merchandise sales (25–70% off claimed retail)
Take Today third-party flexible payment plans
EZ+ Rewards Program (online pawn and layaway management)
Online shop with daily new arrivals
Product Protection Plans for electronics and A/V equipment
Jewelry VIP Program (guaranteed loan amounts, stone replacement, free cleaning)
